findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "fetch" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

name: list_open_events
description: Florida events currently published on VenuMark and taking food vendor applications. Optional city filter. Each result includes the application deadline, required documents, and the public apply_url where a vendor applies (free account).

name: get_event
description: One published event's public details: dates, venue, city, application deadline, required documents, and the apply link. Use the slug from list_open_events or from a venumark.com/event/<slug> URL.

name: get_signup_link
description: A direct VenuMark signup link for the human to open in their browser. role 'venue' is for organizers who run vendor applications; optional tier ('growth' or 'pro') and cadence ('month' or 'year') preselect the plan, and checkout completes in the browser via Stripe. role 'vendor' is for food trucks a

name: submit_lead
description: Send an organizer's contact request to the VenuMark founder (setup help, demo, festival or city program, Enterprise scope). Only call after the user has explicitly confirmed the exact details to send. The founder replies by email, usually the same day.

name: search
description: Alias of search_vendors for ChatGPT Deep Research connectors. Returns matching Florida food vendors as results with id, title, and url. Pass the id to fetch for the full record.

name: fetch
description: Alias of get_scorecard for ChatGPT Deep Research connectors. Takes a vendor id from search and returns the full public scorecard as a document (id, title, text, url, metadata).

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "fetch" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_event, search, fetch · Private data: search_vendors, get_scorecard, decide_vendor, improve_my_score, list_open_events, get_event, submit_lead, search, fetch · Public sink: submit_lead · Destructive: get_signup_link.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_event, search, fetch · Private data: search_vendors, get_scorecard, decide_vendor, improve_my_score, list_open_events, get_event, submit_lead, search, fetch · Public sink: submit_lead · Destructive: get_signup_link

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
